steps.title: Read the sentence and find the logical signal
steps.content: The sentence says creating the national trail would ______ their preservation efforts because the US government provides extra protections to national trails. The “because” clause gives a reason the trail would help those efforts, so the blank needs a word meaning to actively support or advance something.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘inspire’: Meaning “motivate or influence,” this implies the trail would stir up new motivation for efforts that already exist — not what the “because” clause says. Wrong direction. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘ignore’: Meaning “overlook,” this directly contradicts the context; the trail is meant to help preservation, not disregard it. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘promote’: Meaning “advance or support,” this fits exactly — the government protections that come with national-trail status would advance the preservation efforts. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘reduce’: Meaning “decrease,” this is the opposite of what the “because” clause supports. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
